name: Sauteed Chicken Livers with Mushrooms and Oni
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the chicken livers by removing any connective tissue and cut them in half.
2. Pat the livers dry on paper towels.
3. Heat the butter and olive oil together in a pan.
4. Add the mushrooms and onions to the pan and sauté until nicely brown, stirring occasionally.
5. Add the chicken livers to the pan and cook for 5 to 6 minutes.
6. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Pour in the white wine and continue cooking, stirring to incorporate any pan drippings, for an additional minute or two.
8. Adjust the seasonings as needed.
9. Serve on squares of hot buttered toast and garnish with chopped parsley.
